title: Bare Bones x Glitchfiend
body:
# THIS RESOURCEPACK IS TEMPORARILY OUTDATED, AN UPDATE WILL BE PUSHED OUT TO THIS RESOURCEPACK SOON.
## Bare Bones x Glitchfiend
**Resource Pack aiming to make Glitchfiend Mods such as Tough As Nails, Biomes O' Plenty and Serene Seasons compatible with Bare Bones.**

![Tough As Nails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fded34703a5820022c1a37eee90e29a75d15a80.png)
--------------------------
**Progress:**
- **Tough As Nails: 100%**
- **Biomes O' Plenty: 100%**
--------------------------
